problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
